backtrace_samples.author: Clara Sophia
backtrace_samples.work:
Many of you have asked us about this..
And my heart is so happy that it’s finally happening!!
A new album is coming out soon with the most special sound healing journeys we posted on here.
So finally you can listen to our meditative music wherever you are, on all music platforms! ✨

We’d love for you to be a part of this album, so please share with us:
👉 Which sound journey is your favorite?
👉 What song would you love to have in this new album?

Let us know in the comments! 🤍

PS - We also wanted to share our gratitude for the overwhelming love on our new video.
It’s so good to be back and connect with you all on here again! 🥹🤍

backtrace_samples.author: Dynasty Electrik
backtrace_samples.work:
Light Codes DNA Activation - Light Language Starseed Sound Healing - 432Hz - 444Hz - 528Hz - 888Hz https://youtu.be/BWoskZfunmw There is new light energy streaming in from the cosmos, helping us to unlock hidden potentials and activate dormant strands in our DNA. We are pleased to offer a complete compilation of our Light Codes download of cosmic information. Embark on a transformative journey of full-spectrum DNA activation, where the harmonics of 432Hz, 444Hz, 528Hz, and 888Hz converge to awaken your divine potential. These celestial frequencies resonate with the deepest layers of your energetic and physical matrix, gently unlocking dormant light codes within your DNA.

* 432Hz: The frequency of universal harmony, grounding you in the sacred rhythm of the cosmos.

* 444Hz: A stabilizing vibration that amplifies clarity, balance, and alignment with higher realms.

* 528Hz: Known as the "Miracle Tone," it restores the blueprint of perfect health and opens your heart to profound love.

* 888Hz: The frequency of infinite abundance, activating divine consciousness and the limitless flow of spiritual and material prosperity.

Allow these sacred tones to recalibrate your energy field, elevate your vibration, and awaken the luminous wisdom encoded within. Breathe deeply, open your heart, and step into the radiant light of your true essence.

backtrace_samples.author: Emilio Ortiz
backtrace_samples.work:
A recent photograph captured at Dr. Joe Dispenza’s retreat. 

The act of holding my hand over my heart has gained tremendous significance to me in the last few years. 

Whenever a storms comes through my world, I know that in this space of zero point neutrality, all problems fade away. There’s no more fear. No more struggle. No more chaos. 

As we enter a new year, I want to take a moment to acknowledge this beautiful heart centered community.

We started off 2024 with 20,000 people subscribed to this channel and we have grown in leaps and bounds. 

What this means is that more and more people are beginning to ask questions beyond themselves and are curious to understand the layers deep within themselves. 

I can already feel how much of a quantum leap 2025 will be for all of us. World events will reveal new truths; new voices and ideas will be heard. Mysteries will be remembered. Dormant potentials within us will be reawakened. 

There is nothing that I’m more excited about than the unfolding story of humanity. 

It’s a blessing to be part of this moment in history that the future generations will look back upon. 

We are all a monumental seed in this new story. 

Thank you for coming together, with your minds open and your hearts open. 

Thank you for trusting in me.

Thank you for taking this journey.

All our higher selves are so proud of us. 

We are only getting started 🚀

I love you all with my all my heart ✨🫂❤️‍🔥

backtrace_samples.author: Esoteric Atlanta
backtrace_samples.work:
You guys!!!! I am floored by all the reviews Paula and I have gotten over The Esoteric Academy! 😭😭😭 Your reviews mean the world to me. THIS WORK means the world to me. THANK YOU, THANK YOU, THANK YOU! I know I create hard workouts, but I am TICKLED by all the reviews of how fun they are too!!!  THAT IS MY PLAN. Just because something is hard doesn’t mean it can’t also be fun!!! 🤩 Every thing in life that is worthwhile, is hard. Everything in life that is hard builds the soul.  And guess what! YOU ARE WORTH DOING HARD THINGS!!!! You’re worth it. Every time you get on your mat, every time you lace up that running shoe, every time you pull that ballet barre out… you are worth it. You’re worth the sweat, you’re worth the soreness, you’re worth the discomfort.

I am also SO EXCITED that a few of you have told me (literally two in one day- there must be something in the air) that your teenage daughters are JOINING YOU AND HAVING FUN!!! To get a compliment from a TEENAGE GIRL is literally the same as winning an Oscar. 🤣 

To the teenage girls working out with your mamas… baby girls, YOU CAN DO HARD THINGS. And baby girls, you are WORTH it. I’m so glad you’re learning at a young age that exercise is not about punishing your body, but rather, it’s a way to activate your body, your chakras, your soul. It’s a way to cleanse yourself, renew your soul, and find out just how strong you are.  

With that being said, I hear y’all (the teenage girls)  really like the Fusion classes (me too😜). So for the teenage girls, their mamas, and every single soul in the academy, I am creating a 75 minute fusion class with all the hits. I’ve got music from the adults generation and yours (the teenagers). 

It’ll be shot next week!!! 

Please don’t hesitate to make request! I love that y’all are loving it and I will do everything in my power to serve you to my best ability as a professional spiritual ass kicker!!! 

I also cannot wait to start our live classes and weekly calls. 

For those who want to join in the fun, check us out at www.theesotericacademy.com

backtrace_samples.work:
Today I have something very exciting to share with you! 😍
I know that many of you have been waiting for this offering for a long time and I'm so happy that it's finally ready to be in your hands!

If you are curious to open up your voice with me, or to connect deeper to your inner self..
I have good news!
My very first big Online Course “Voice Revelation” will come out on the 05/03!!

I’m having a big smile on my face writing these lines, as I am just so happy that I can finally share this with you!
Over the past 10 years of my life, I’ve been deeply immersed in my own voice healing journey.
I learned with many different teachers and kept exploring and developing my own practices, inspired by my studies and nature.

Everything you see of me here, all your favorite sound journeys, are the fruits of these exclusive voice and mindfulness practices that work on all levels - body, mind and spirit. 
Now I’ve gathered all of these powerful techniques into one transformational Online Course!

“Voice Revelation” is not only about learning how to sing beautifully, but it is so much more than that.
Whether you’re a singer or not, this offering is for you if you want to deepen your connection with your inner self, open up your voice to its fullest potential, and learn how to heal yourself with your own voice.

There’s so much more to share about this big heart creation and over the next weeks I will slowly reveal more and more to those who are a part of my newsletter. ♡

So if you'd like to hear more about it, come and join me there: https://clarasophia.com/?n=1

I’m sending you so much love,
Clara Sophia

Beautiful beings, we hope you’re all doing well. 
Our past weeks have been filled with beautiful nature places, lots of music, and creative processes.
And we are so grateful to share this new song with you today!
‘Whispers of Starlight’ is a song that emerged in a musical collaboration with our dear friend and talented musician playing the guitar with our soundscapes.
It was such a magical moment.. ✨✨
This song brings beautiful and wise messages from the stars onto this earth, through healing sounds and vibrations. 🪽
In times like these, where the world seems to become a very chaotic place that is moving so fast, we feel it’s so important to find ways to stay grounded and connect to the wisdom that us hidden within our hearts.
We hope you can feel this message resonating deeply within you and find a safe space for you to rest in with these soundscapes..

With so much love,
Clara & Yuval 🤍

It’s My Birthday - and I have a Special Gift for You! ✨

Today, I’m turning 27, and as I reflect on my journey, I’m so grateful for how deeply my voice-healing path has changed my life.

15 years ago, I began exploring my voice - releasing fears, overcoming shame, and stepping into my true expression.
It’s been a journey of profound healing and alignment with my soul’s purpose.

It always been my dream to share these gifts that my voice has shown me with other beautiful souls..

So to celebrate this special day, I’m offering 27% off the already discounted price of my Voice Revelation online course - but only for the next 48 hours! ✨

This course is my heart’s work - a space where you can heal, release blocks, and discover the magic within your voice.
If you’ve ever felt called to explore the healing power of your voice, I’d love to welcome you into this journey.

👉 Start your Voice Revelation here:
https://clarasophia.com/voice-revelation#bd-sale

With so much love,
Clara Sophia 🤍

To All of You in or around London.
Our in person Shamanic Sound Ceremony is happening this Saturday!

I’m honoured to co-host this experience with the incredible Roberta form SoulBird Art by Roberta Orpwood , a truly gifted shamanic practitioner and artist. Together, we’ll create a symphony of the Sacred, weaving Spirit’s supportive energy with sonic frequencies into the warm embrace of our intimate community space.

- Our Intention 
To offer you a serene and welcoming space where your heart and mind can rest, recharge, and reconnect. Through the enchanting vibrations of voice, Tibetan bowls, drums, rattles, and chimes, you’ll embark on an unforgettable shamanic journey—one that invites deep relaxation, profound peace, and limitless possibilities for how these sounds can nourish the dream seeds you have for the months ahead.

DATE: Saturday 26th April 2025
TIME: 7:30 PM London UK time
LOCATION: St. Michael's and All Angels community centre, Barnes, South West London
TICKETS: https://larimarsound.com/live-events

I look forward to welcoming You into our Sonic Sacred Space.

In resonance,
Larimar

This transmission was channeled during deep meditative connection with Andromedan beings of light—guardians of ancient knowledge and soul memory. The lyrics came as a wave of crystalline energy, blending sacred light language and divine poetry to open a portal within the Akashic Field.

🌟 What are the Akashic Records?
They are the library of your soul, containing every experience, memory, and potential you carry across time and dimensions. When accessed with integrity, reverence, and love, they offer healing, remembrance, and transformation.

Through this sacred sound journey, we are guided to:
💠 Awaken our soul’s purpose
💠 Heal emotional timelines

🧬 This mantra is an energetic restoration of your original blueprint—but remember:

backtrace_samples.author: Emilio Ortiz
backtrace_samples.work:
Familia, 

I am in the deepest gratitude today as I enter my 27th cycle around the sun. 🦀♋️

This journey has been tne most fulfilling one that I could have chosen in this lifetime. 

A few years ago, I would’ve never thought that at this stage of life, I coulld honestly wake up every morning and be 100% sure that I was on the right path. 

Many twists and turns, doubts and regrets, challenges and blessings shaped my early 20s.

I chose the road less traveled. But through it all, it led me to this community. It led me to teachings and teachers that have opened my heart so wide that words are not enough to describe. 

If you’ve ever felt that you’ve wanted to go deeper with my story, my dear friend and brother Michael Sandler has just published a very special podcast between us over on his channel. My invitation is that you watch it if your heart feels called 🫂

Here it is 👉 https://youtu.be/2n6NrVts4IQ?si=3oBThktN4yk0KkM8

And also, my greatest birthday gift and ask today would be to have this whole community signed up to my first ever LIVE (free) “Opening Ceremony” coming up on August 2nd. 

I will reveal some very special advancements and evolutions of this community.

See you there 💫
👉 https://iamemilioortiz.com/the-opening-ceremony/

backtrace_samples.author: Anna Brown
backtrace_samples.work:
Consciousness is genderless, but I AM grateful for the female vessel I AM shining through. Because during this time of the planetary shift, the Divine Feminine is reawakening and being reinstated into our avatars’ expression. ⁣
⁣
Naturally, the female avatar is inclined towards FEELING and INTUITIVE knowing. However, since we have lived in a mind-dominant, conquer and divide world, women and men were taught to suppress and repress their hearts knowing. But, I’m here to remind you to FORGET THAT SHIT and let your feminine energy fly! Because we need your sensuality and intuitiveness! ⁣
⁣
Intuitive feeling and knowing are absolute gifts because they are heart-centered energies. And if we want to see our species thrive, Humanity must open its heart chakra because the heart is all about love, unity, creativity, and wisdom. ⁣
⁣
Truly, how could one keep creating war and separation when one’s heart is flooding with Love and Unity? ⁣
⁣
You can’t.⁣
⁣
Therefore, it doesn’t matter if you appear male or female; we can all open our hearts and be more sensual, intuitive, and connected to our physical body avatar with our Cosmic Love and understanding. ⁣
⁣
The more you connect to the physical body avatar with pure consciousness/love, the more you connect to the grid of Gaia. The more you connect to Gaia, the more you can influence the collective consciousness with vibrant energy and amplitude! ⁣
⁣
Knowing this, what will you live for today? ⁣
⁣
LOVE or the shove?⁣
⁣
The choice is yours.⁣
⁣
⁣
⁣
🧘🏼‍♀️☕🌈⁣
⁣
⁣
⁣

⁣
✨ Website: https://www.wonderfullynothing.com⁣
⁣
✨Join the High Vibe Patreon Community: https://www.patreon.com/annaebrown7⁣
⁣
⁣

backtrace_samples.author: Arcturian Healing Energy
backtrace_samples.work:
✨ Arcturian Liver Healing Meditation — Gentle Energy Cleanse & Reset

Close your eyes for a breath… step into a quiet chamber of light. 🌌  
A wordless stream of refined Arcturian frequency, warm low pads, and crystalline overtones invites the body to exhale, the mind to soften, and the liver space to rest in clarity and care.


🔗 https://youtu.be/KmY9Mp4d8Tc
🔗 https://youtu.be/KmY9Mp4d8Tc

🔗 https://youtu.be/KmY9Mp4d8Tc

ㅤ

ㅤ
What this field supports ✨  
— calm, compassionate presence in the liver area (release • renewal • gentle strength) 🌿  
— whole-field ease and soft emotional settling 🕊️  
— focus-friendly ambience for study, writing, and mindful tasks 📚  
— evening wind-down and sleep integration when looped 🌙  
— subtle starseed remembrance and quiet inner coherence 🌟

ㅤ
How to receive (simple ritual) 🌙  
— Dim the room; place your device a little away from the body.  
— One hand on heart, one on upper abdomen; inhale 4–6, exhale a touch longer.  
— Intend softly: “I welcome gentle release and loving alignment.”  
— Keep volume low–moderate; allow the track to complete or loop for sleep.  
— Afterward, sip water and write one sentence to anchor the shift. 💧

ㅤ
Beautiful ways to use it ⏳  
— journaling, breathwork, Reiki or self-healing 🕯️  
— quiet background for creative flow or reflective prayer 🎨  
— integration days alongside solar-plexus and digestion care 🌞

ㅤ
Share with us 💬  
One word for your intention — release, clarity, renewal, peace — and bless someone else’s in the comments. We rise by witnessing each other. 💙

ㅤ
If this transmission nourishes you, subscribe, like, and save it to your nightly ritual playlist so the field can meet you again, right where you are.

ㅤ
Gentle note: this is spiritual/energetic support, not medical advice.

#ArcturianHealingEnergy #ArcturianFrequency #ArcturianMusic #ArcturianHealing #LiverHealing #EnergyRecalibration #HealingChamberOfLight #LightLanguage #StarseedActivation #MeditationMusic #EnergyHealingMusic #GalacticHealing

Something exciting is opening today - the biggest (and final) sale of the year for my course Voice Revelation.
✨ Join here for 50% OFF: https://clarasophia.com/voice-revelation-black-friday/

But before I say more, I want to share something personal with you..

Lately, I’ve felt a deep longing in myself and within our community for peace, safety, connection, and love. Maybe you’ve been feeling it too.

In a world that moves so fast, it’s hard to slow down or hear your own inner voice. For me, intuitive singing has always been my anchor, the practice that brings me home when I feel overwhelmed or lost.

And I want you to experience that same softening and freedom.

From Nov 27 - Dec 1, Voice Revelation is open at its biggest discount of the year, with 50% off - a gentle, guided journey to help you:


🪽 Release emotional blocks and tension
🌿 Calm your mind and regulate your nervous system
💫 Awaken your true voice - for singing, speaking, and living authentically

You’ll be joining a global community of kind, like-hearted souls, with personal guidance from me along the way. No experience needed - just your breath, your body, your voice.

This portal will only be open for 4 more days, and when it closes, the price returns to full.

If your heart feels the call… this is your moment.
✨ Start your Voice Revelation now: https://clarasophia.com/voice-revelation-black-friday/

Sending love to you, soul family and I can't wait to welcome you into my voice healing community! 🤍

backtrace_samples.author: Anna Brown
backtrace_samples.work:
Why do you do what you do? What makes you get out of bed in the morning?⁣
⁣
If we don’t have a WHY, we will always stumble back into the darkness and only live for petty reasons. ⁣
⁣
My WHY is my children and my children's children. As many of you know, I am a mom of two with a third one on the way in April! And it's my honor and joy to leave them a legacy of love and wisdom that they can embody, shine, and pass down to their family. Openly sharing our Timeless Wisdom is how we create a new species and a new culture. We hand down what's of true importance—⁣
⁣
The teachings of conscious love, joy, and Presence! ⁣
⁣
For we are all a family of light pretending we are not. ⁣
⁣
What a dream to awaken from!⁣
⁣
So, what's your WHY? ⁣
⁣
I'd love to know what gets your heart drumming for creation—for your family!⁣
⁣
XO,⁣
Anna (and Lila)! ⁣
⁣
⁣🫶🏻
⁣
www.wonderfullynothing.com

backtrace_samples.author: Mind-Body Solution
backtrace_samples.work:
What if neurons aren’t the foundation of mind?

In this Mind-Body Solution Colloquia, Michael Levin and Robert Chis-Ciure challenge one of neuroscience’s deepest assumptions: that cognition and intelligence are exclusive to brains and neurons.

Drawing on cutting-edge work in bioelectricity, developmental biology, and philosophy of mind, this conversation explores how cells, tissues, and living systems exhibit goal-directed behavior, memory, and problem-solving — long before neurons ever appear.

We explore:
• Cognition without neurons
• Bioelectric networks as control systems
• Memory and learning beyond synapses
• Morphogenesis as collective intelligence
• Implications for AI, consciousness, and ethics

This episode pushes neuroscience beyond the neuron, toward a deeper understanding of mind, life, and intelligence as continuous across scales.

backtrace_samples.author: Clara Sophia
backtrace_samples.work:
As you all know, the past few weeks I’ve felt slower and more tender.
More tired than usual. A little overwhelmed. Wanting more space, more quiet, more time to just be.
And from your messages, I know many of you are feeling it too 🤍

With this full moon + eclipse energy, things can feel amplified. Not always in big dramatic ways, sometimes it’s just your body asking you to pause.

And honestly, with everything happening in the world right now… so much darkness coming to light… it’s natural that sensitive, empathetic souls feel it deeply.

So if you’re feeling heavier or more inward lately, it doesn’t mean something is wrong.
Every transformation has a cocoon phase.
A darker phase.
A moment where you pull back before something new can emerge.

Let yourself take space.
Let yourself realign.
Come back to what feels true for you.

And I want to share something special with you..

This Thursday, I’m releasing a new sound healing journey, with this beautiful soul radiating his love through the screen. 🥰
It felt deeply healing for me while creating it and I'm excited to be back.

Take gentle care of yourselves. I’m so grateful we’re walking this path together. 🤍
